race.comment: SHE'S A HUSTLER (11) took the field up to Jenni at Doomben and suffered as a result. Needs this sort of trip now so she can play a role, particularly if something else does the dirty work this time. Cups hero HALF YOURS (1) has underperformed in Queensland this Winter. Worth another chance as gets closer to his optimal trip. ZAMBARDO (8) ran second to Via Sistina in the 2000m Champions Stakes at Flemington last Spring. Had his chance at Rosehill last start but can find another gear now. Not willing to discount him. MILITARIZE (5) missed last start in the Lord Mayor's Cup, but only narrowly and it showed he's not completely gone just yet. JMac from a good draw and he's a heavy deck winner in the past. Not out of this.
